SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-03-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE FISCHER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE DINTCHO--ASSISTANT ACCOUNTANT OF DOUBLE AA CORP. AND DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CARLOS LOPEZ FOR HIMSELF AND FOR C J AUTO 76--SHOP MANGER. DEFENDANT C J AUTO 76 WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/19/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
